Motion To Compel Eco Terra Pest Managements Production Of Business Records And Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-01-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. VAHAN DEMIRDJIAN, Esq. of Mybedbuglawyer, Inc. (Tel: 818-907-5333) for plaintiffs;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS CYNTHIA DURAZO and DANIEL MORENO's Motion To Compel Eco Terra Pest Managements Production Of Business Records.

Plaintiffs stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. Plaintiffs' counsel authorizes the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on his behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiffs' unopposed motion is granted. ECO Terra Pest Management shall produce all documents specified in Plaintiffs' Deposition Subpoena for Production of Business Records and pay sanctions of $1,750 to Plaintiffs' attorneys by August 15, 2024.

The Court instructs plaintiffs' counsel to prepare a proposed order, serve it on the opposing side for approval as to form, and then submit the proposed order to the pro tem judge at
bruce.highman@highmanlaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (525/JPT)
